title: The Histories
description: A lengthy account of the Greco-Persian Wars and other historical events by Herodotus

title: History of the Peloponnesian War
description: A historical account of the Peloponnesian War between Athens and Sparta by Thucydides

title: Anabasis
description: A narrative of the expedition of Greek mercenaries in Persia by Xenophon

title: Parallel Lives
description: A series of biographies of famous Greeks and Romans by Plutarch
